entry.title: New: CR 25-46 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 56, CD1 (2025), to authorize discounted water rates for Department of Water Supply consumers who are using water primarily for the purpose of conserving or restoring native Hawaiian species habitats without any associated commercial activity.

Water and Infrastructure Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
